title: Payments API: elevated error rate
body: If payments-api error rate spikes above 5%, first check the upstream provider status page and recent deploys. Most recent incidents have been caused by stripe-sdk version bumps or configuration changes to the fraud rules engine. Owner: payments-platform team.

title: Auth service: mass login failure
body: If auth-svc error rate exceeds 50% for more than 2 minutes, treat as SEV1. Check for recent JWT signing key rotation or IdP outages (Okta, Auth0). Page security on-call in parallel with reliability on-call. Owner: identity team.

title: Search index lag
body: Index lag above 60s usually points to ingestion consumer backlog. Check Kafka consumer group offsets for search-indexer. Scale the consumer horizontally if CPU is saturated. Owner: search-infra team.

title: Database connection exhaustion
body: If services across multiple teams report timeouts and the DB reports pgbouncer pool saturated, look for recent migrations or long-running queries. Kill-switch migrations with pg_terminate_backend. Owner: data-platform team.
